gcc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/prg.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/prg.dir/home/andrei/Downloads/Hayware-Engine-2D-main/src/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/prg.dir/home/andrei/Downloads/Hayware-Engine-2D-main/src/utils.c.o" "CMakeFiles/prg.dir/home/andrei/Downloads/Hayware-Engine-2D-main/src/breakout.c.o" "CMakeFiles/prg.dir/home/andrei/Downloads/Hayware-Engine-2D-main/src/stb_image.c.o" "CMakeFiles/prg.dir/home/andrei/Downloads/Hayware-Engine-2D-main/src/SDL/init_window.c.o" "CMakeFiles/prg.dir/home/andrei/Downloads/Hayware-Engine-2D-main/src/render.c.o" "CMakeFiles/prg.dir/home/andrei/Downloads/Hayware-Engine-2D-main/src/demo.c.o" -o /home/andrei/Downloads/Hayware-Engine-2D-main/build/prg  /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libSDL3.so.0.4.2 /usr/lib/libGLEW.so -lcglm -lm
